about.metaDescription: BEQSAN — Roman Sharashidze's workshop in Batumi's Salibauri district. Hand-built aluminium and PVC windows and doors since 1998.
about.heading: One workshop. One source. One person who answers.
about.lead: BEQSAN is a Batumi coastal-city workshop that has been hand-shaping windows and doors since 1998. Nothing is outsourced — measurement, cutting, assembly, installation — all under one roof.
about.introBody1: Roman Sharashidze opened the workshop in 1998, when fabricated-window production was rare in Batumi and the market was full of cheap aluminium pulled off the bazaar. Roman set one rule: a window I haven't personally inspected does not leave the shop.
about.introBody2: Twenty-five years later that rule has not changed — only the tools, materials, and team have. Today the Salibauri workshop runs with up to 12 craftsmen, serving roughly 620 sites a year across Batumi and the Guria–Adjara region.
about.quote: A window is built once. It lives 25 years. It deserves good material and hand assembly.
about.suppliersBody: Aluminium — Alumil (Greece) and Profilco; PVC — Rehau (Germany); hardware — Hoppe and G-U; glass — our own small glass facility in Gori (energy-efficient Low-E, triplex).
about.suppliersNote: We want you to know where the material comes from. Supplier names are not confidential.
about.founderBio: Born in Batumi, graduated from Batumi Technical College in 1995. Fell in love with fabricated-window production during a 1996-97 internship at Roto Frank in Germany. Has led the workshop since 1998.
about.value1Body: Centralised standards — yes. Robots — no. Every fastener is checked by hand by the craftsman.
about.value2Body: We don't hide the spec. Which profile, which fittings, which glass — all of it is written into the order spec sheet.
about.value3Body: Never a third-party crew. Whoever assembles the window in the shop is the same team that installs it on site.
about.ctaTitle: Want to see which projects we've worked on?
about.ctaBody: The gallery shows Batumi-centre hotels, Kobuleti cottages, Kutaisi apartment complexes.

process.metaDescription: A window's journey from order to installation — seven stages in BEQSAN's Salibauri workshop. Hand-assembled, one team end to end.
process.heading: Seven stages. One team. One person who answers.
process.lead: Window production doesn't happen in a day. It's measured, drawn, cut, assembled, installed — and at every stage you know who's responsible. Here's the real flow, not a marketing slideshow.

1.title: Site visit and measurement
1.body1: A craftsman comes to you within 24–48 hours. The opening is checked with a laser measure. We look at wall deflection, water-drain angles, opening flatness — all of it matters at install.
1.body2: After measurement, a photo report is prepared. You receive a PDF spec — width, height, depth — in the same format the configurator uses.

2.title: Design and drafting
2.body1: Your configurator choices + the craftsman's measurements go into CAD. We verify the thermal break, hardware compatibility, opening correction — before any production starts.
2.body2: Usually 1–2 days. Complex projects (4m+ panoramic, bay windows) take 3–4 days.

3.title: Profile delivery
3.body1: Aluminium ships from Alumil's Tbilisi warehouse. PVC from the Rehau branch. Lead time — 5–8 business days from order confirmation.
3.body2: Delivered profile is indexed separately for your site. It doesn't get mixed with anyone else's order.

4.title: Cutting and machining
4.body1: Numerically controlled cuts at 45° or 90°, then hand-finishing. Water-drain channels are routed; hardware holes drilled by hand from a template.
4.body2: Every piece is marked with your order number — hardware holes never get mixed across windows.

5.title: Window assembly
5.body1: Frame is bolted together; corners are heat-welded. Hardware follows — handle, latch, lock, thermal silicone seal around the perimeter.
5.body2: One craftsman works on one window at a time — not a conveyor. It's slower, but there's no alternative to hardware precision.

6.title: Glazing and QA
6.body1: Low-E or triplex glass arrives from the Gori facility as a pre-assembled IGU. It's set into the frame; seal tightness is verified.
6.body2: Every assembled window goes through QA: warp test, lock test, thermal-seal visual inspection. Sign-off on the inspection sheet by the craftsman.

7.title: Installation at your site
7.body1: Our installer — never an outside crew. Arrives in the workshop van. Old window removed, new one fitted, thermal silicone perimeter, water-drain check.
7.body2: Installation in Batumi is free. Kobuleti/Ozurgeti/Kutaisi — only the delivery cost the configurator computes from your address.

process.ctaTitle: The configurator shows you a price in one minute
process.ctaBody: Stage one of the window's journey is your choice. The rest is on us.

materials.metaDescription: Aluminium, PVC, glass, RAL colour — BEQSAN uses only named-brand materials. We don't hide the spec.
materials.heading: Material that ages well.
materials.lead: Material choice largely defines window lifetime. Here's what we use, why, what spec we hold to — and who we buy from.
materials.alumLead: Alumil S-77 and S-91 series, Greek-made. 24–34 mm polyamide thermal break that interrupts heat transfer from aluminium to aluminium.
materials.alumWhy: Why aluminium? Permanent colour (anodised + powder coat), 50+ year lifespan, and for panoramic glass there's no real alternative.
materials.pvcLead: Rehau Synego 70 mm profile, German-made. Five chambers, central steel reinforcement, rubber gasket for sealing.
materials.pvcWhy: Why PVC? Better profile-level thermal insulation, ~25% cheaper than aluminium, best for residential windows. Limitation: large sizes (3m+) push back to aluminium.
materials.glassLead: Triple-pane with Low-E coating and argon fill. 4-16-4-16-4 mm configuration, 44 mm total thickness.
materials.glassWhy: Low-E is an invisible metallic layer on the glass interior — it reflects summer solar heat outward and retains room heat inward in winter.
materials.ralLead: 188 standard RAL colours, plus wood-effect foils (8 options) for PVC. Aluminium gets powder coat or anodising.
materials.ralNote: Colour doesn't have to be the same inside and out — bi-colour windows are possible (PVC only).
materials.glossaryLead: Window terms you might want to recognise — short, no hand-waving.

uvalue.def: Heat transfer coefficient. Lower is better insulation. A good window's total U-value lands around 1.0–1.4 W/m²K.

lowE.def: An invisible metallic layer on the inner glass surface that reflects infrared radiation — retains room heat in winter.

argon.def: Inert gas inside the IGU (instead of air) — better thermal insulation, doesn't degrade over time.

thermal.def: Polyamide insert between two aluminium layers that interrupts heat transfer. Critical for any aluminium window.

triplex.def: Two glass sheets bonded by a PVB layer — on impact it doesn't shatter, stays on the film. Used for safety.

ral.def: European colour standard — 188 named/numbered colours. RAL 9016 is bright white, RAL 7016 anthracite grey.

casement.def: Window opening mechanism — side-open + top-tilt from a single handle. The most common pattern in Europe.

sliding.def: A horizontally sliding window sash. Common on balconies because it doesn't sweep into the room.

materials.ctaBody: Step 2 of the configurator shows aluminium vs PVC with thermal coefficients and per-m² price.

warranty.metaDescription: BEQSAN warranty — what's covered, what isn't, how we respond to problems. Aluminium 10 years, PVC 5, hardware 2.
warranty.heading: A good window is a long promise. Here's what we hold ourselves to.
warranty.lead: A warranty sheet shouldn't be a legal trick. We write it plainly — what's covered, what isn't, what timelines we work to. You can download the full PDF tailored to your window after the order.
notCovered: DIY adjustment or work by a non-BEQSAN crew

1.title: Tell us
1.body: Call or WhatsApp. Share the order number if you have it — we'll find it in the spec if not.

2.title: We come to check
2.body: A craftsman is on site within 48 hours in Batumi, 5 days regionally. A photo report is prepared.

3.title: We fix it
3.body: If it's within warranty — free. If not — we tell you the price up front, then proceed.

warranty.climateBody: Black Sea humidity, 1,200+ mm of annual rainfall, salt breeze — these are a window's enemies. So we use weathered hardware versions and UV-stable, salt-resistant thermal silicone. This isn't an opt-in — it's our standard.
careTips: Frame — clean with mild soap water and a soft cloth. Never abrasives or acetone.
Hardware — once a year, one drop of machine oil into the cylindrical hinge.
Glass — regular glass cleaner. The Low-E coating is on the inside — outside cleaning doesn't affect it.
Thermal silicone seal — visual check every 5–7 years. If it's deteriorating, call us.
warranty.ctaBody: At the Batumi workshop or by phone — we're available every business day.

contact.metaDescription: BEQSAN workshop — Salibauri, Batumi. Phone, WhatsApp, email, and address on one page.
contact.heading: Salibauri, Batumi. Visit us or call.
contact.lead: Workshop hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–19:00, Saturday 10:00–15:00 by appointment. We always welcome guests with coffee.
contact.directions: 8 km north of central Batumi, along Salibauris Gza — look for the blue tin shed with the BEQSAN logo. Parking is in the workshop yard.
contact.mapNote: Stylised map. Tap below to open in Google Maps for navigation.
contact.closerBody: Choosing a window from a screen alone can be hard. In the workshop you can handle real profiles, hardware samples, glass units — and if you find the one you want, a craftsman can be scheduled for an on-site measurement immediately.

footer.tagline: Hand-built windows and doors. Batumi, since 1998.

layout.title: Layout
layout.heading: Your window's structure
layout.intro: How many panes and how each one opens — fixed, casement, tilt or sliding. The price updates live.
layout.paneWidthHandleLabel: Width divider between pane {{from}} and pane {{to}}

dimensions.widthOutOfRange: Width must be between {{min}} and {{max}} cm
dimensions.heightOutOfRange: Height must be between {{min}} and {{max}} cm

layout.panesRequired: At least one pane is required.
layout.paneCount: Pane count must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
layout.widthRatioSum: Pane widths must add up to the full width.
layout.doorTooManyFixed: A door may have at most one fixed pane (a sidelight).
layout.slidingInvalidOpening: Pane {{position}} can't use that opening — sliding systems allow only fixed or sliding.
layout.hingeForbidden: Pane {{position}} shouldn't have a hinge side.
layout.openingTypeInvalid: Pane {{position}} has an invalid opening type.
layout.hingeSideInvalid: Pane {{position}} has an invalid hinge side.

glass.notCompatibleWithMaterial: This glass isn't available with the chosen material.
glass.frostedTintedConflict: Frosted and tinted can't be applied to the same pane — pick one.
glass.extraInvalid: Pane {{position}} has an invalid glass add-on.

accessory.handleRequired: A handle is required for doors.
accessory.handleNoOpenablePane: A handle only fits on openable panes.
accessory.handleNotCompatible: This handle isn't available with the chosen material.
accessory.lockRequired: A lock is required for doors.
accessory.lockNotCompatibleProduct: This lock isn't available with the chosen product.
accessory.lockRequiresFullOpening: This lock requires a casement or tilt-and-turn pane.
accessory.sillLengthOutOfRange: Sill length must be between {{min}} and {{max}} cm.
accessory.blindNotCompatibleProduct: This blind isn't available with the chosen product.
accessory.blindControlNotSupported: This blind doesn't support that control type.

color.notCompatibleWithMaterial: This colour isn't available with the chosen material.
color.notCompatibleOuter: Outside colour isn't available with this material.
color.notCompatibleInner: Inside colour isn't available with this material.
color.dualOnlyOnPvc: Separate inside colour is PVC-only — aluminum is painted as a single colour.
color.ralCustomMissing: No colour was picked from the RAL palette.
color.ralCustomCodeInvalid: RAL code format is invalid — e.g. RAL 9016.
